陈右时是个懦弱的十八线演员，为了生机，他一口气接了三个人设不同的剧本。
在偶像剧里他要扮演拜倒在女主魅力下的男n号，一个多情风流的海王。
在悬疑剧里他要扮演最后出场的反派，一个冷静高智商的罪犯。
在恐怖片里他要扮演……呃，一只鬼。
有点难度。
为了更好入戏，陈右时天天抱着道具睡觉。
结果误闯诡异界，他不小心出了意外。
一阵头脑重启后，他绝望发现自己分不清自己的身份了。
他是谁？
他是玩转情场的海王，是冷酷无情的杀手？
还是诡异里的大诡？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/974f75a0a86bf91fdb4f1892b15b1105~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"早起不是枸杞","author_id":"","book_id":"7573676699137625113","book_name":"诡异降临：菜鸡自以为大佬","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":483,"name":"相爱相杀","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=483&name=相爱相杀&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":266,"name":"马甲","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=266&name=马甲&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7573726335504237081","read_count":"31203","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"129655"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"53","tags":"双男主,规则怪谈,大佬,相爱相杀,马甲,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/974f75a0a86bf91fdb4f1892b15b1105~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779502648&x-signature=4FSaijDQSOwfzGqqvOZv9We1PBw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2955908172226271","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241017284C3E70F2DB3CF96156AE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读48分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwa
